title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Ensures that even if students don’t c
content:
✔ Ensures that even if students don’t claim it, fate will assign it randomly.

📌 FINAL LOCK-IN QUESTIONS BEFORE EXECUTING VERSION 8.7

1. Should the Character Alteration Ritual Have a Limited Number of Spots?

✔ Ex: Should only 1-2 players per class be allowed to perform the ritual, or should everyone have access?

2. Should the Unique Archetype Be Able to Pass Its Role to Another Player?

✔ Ex: If the Oracle wishes to retire, should they be able to pass the title, or does it remain locked to one person?

3. Should Players Be Able to Influence the Fate Wheel Outcome If They Have a Certain Power?

✔ Ex: Should the Oracle or another powerful archetype be able to nudge the wheel slightly?

🚀 Now ready to execute Version 8.7. Awaiting final input before moving forward. 🎮📖 Are you fully satisfied with this plan?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 521 (chunk 521/555)
